author: kshitiz
name: SP4096 Int6+zstd 10L496 Overtone+Phase Sliding64
blurb: 8xH100 10-minute run on fineweb10B_sp4096 using int6-style quantization (QUANT_LEVELS=31 stored in int8), zstd-22 compression, fp16 embedding passthrough, overtone embedding init, phase-transition residual mix init, and sliding-window eval (stride=64).
